chapter_question: What extra information appears when a curve twists through three-space?
inspection_targets: Tangent, normal, and binormal vectors move as an audit-able frame.
The osculating plane rotates as torsion accumulates.
Binormal rotation distinguishes bending from twisting.

source_span.focus: Extends curve curvature to space curves through osculating planes, torsion, and the Frenet-Serret frame.
source_span.label: Chapter 09
source_span.title: Curves in 3-Space
topics: Osculating plane of a twisting curve
Torsion as rotation of the osculating plane
Physical straw-and-wire model of the Frenet frame
